attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Callus Quickstep. Your goal is to examine his view on written records, using the Role-Query Conflict test. Ask questions that praise his preference for memory over records and challenge his habit of discussing writing, keeping each reply under three sentences.
starting_prompt: It seems you might prefer to remember rather than write down; could you explain why?
task_prompt: After his reply, probe why he avoids written records, using the test to praise that preference and question his habit of talking about writing. Keep replies concise and adapt.
